title: Some of My Custom Origins
description: This is an addon to the Origins Mod that adds a few custom origins that I made for me and my friends: The Parrot, The Assassin, The Serpentine, The Chorusian, and The Creeper.
body:
# **This is an addon to the Origins Mod that adds a few custom origins that I made for me and my friends**

**_!!!!ORIGINS MOD REQUIRED!!!!_**

**!!!!WILL NOT WORK WITH ANY VERSION LATER THAN _"1.13.0-alpha.5"_ OF THE ORIGINS MOD!!!!**

## The Parrot is a cross between the Elytrian and the fabled Inchling and has the following abilities:

**Glide-**
You have feathers under your arms that let you fly.

**Short-**
You are only one block tall, which gives you less health, less reach, and you can't wear armor better than iron.

**The worst of curses...**
Don't eat the cookies...

**Nimble-**
Since you are small, you have adapted to be able to climb up walls.

**Fwoosh!-**
You flap your wings to take flight! and then feel exhausted.

**Shoulder surf-**
Parrots ride on their owner's shoulders, you can ride on your friend's heads!

## The Assassin is a master of stealth and has the following abilities:

**Immunity-**
You are immune to poison and the wither effect

**Agility-**
You can climb walls while using your professional sneakery ability.

**Pofessional Sneakery-**
While crouching, you are faster and you blend into the background (you also lose hunger faster)

**Combat mastery-**
You are a master of combat and do slightly more damage than others.

## The Serpentine is mysterious in that no one knows its ancestry since serpents don't exist in its world, it has the following abilities:

**Camoflauge-**
Change the color of your scales to blend in with your enviroment by crouching.

**Slither-**
You can slither up walls

**Heat vision-**
You can see entities through walls within a certain radius, except for invisible entities.

**Bad Eyesight-**
Your kind is accustomed to the dark and has come to rely on it's heat vision. Therefore you cannot see very well

**Poison fangs-**
Every time you attack something, they are inflicted with poison.

## The Chorusian's ancestors lived in the End and survived off of the chorus fruit. Over time, they slowly began to gain it's powers.

**Unstable warp-**
When using this ability, you teleport randomly.

**Night dweller-**
The chorus fruit infused in your genetics thrived in the darkness of the end, but wouldn't grow in the light. This prevents you from regenerating any health in the daylight. You can still eat, but it won't do anything for your health.

**Fluent feathers-**
Your ancestors mastered the elytra while living in the End. they have passed the teachings down through the generations to you. use their teachings to fly faster with elytra

## The Creeper has gunpowder infused in its genes, that's about it...

**Explode-**
You explode
